Template Injection — Flow Map
Template Injection Flow Map
Open Figma map ↗
Wix Harmony · Aria · Template Injection

From picked template to personalized site — in two questions.

Today, choosing a template drops the user into an empty, disconnected editor — the selection signal is lost. Template Injection makes Aria greet the user with a short intake (business name → business type), then personalizes the chosen template automatically before editing starts.

Explore the flows ↓
UX? Walk steps 2–4 of each flow. · Dev? Open FR-001 & FR-008 in any step panel. · PM? Hit "Deep dive" top right.
How it works — flow logic
The decision layer behind both flows. Click any box for the detail.
V0 Dashboard first
Top-funnel questions
name · type · goals · etc.
Collected in the dashboard funnel (chat / wizard / skip). Business name + type are critical for injection; description and goals help the AI reach better content.
↓
User chooses
prompt / template
On the "Design your site with Aria" page — either generate from the seeded, editable prompt or pick a template from the AI-filtered gallery.
↓
Business insights platform
is the data complete?
Built and owned by the funnel team — we pull the funnel answers from it and check what's missing. V0 only: in V1.1 the questions happen inside the editor, so the answers are already in the session and there is no platform pull.
↓
Complete
seamless injection
All info present → content is injected into the site with no questions asked. Ever.
Data missing
ask missing Qs → inject
open decision
Only the missing questions are asked. How is an open experience decision: a modal over the editor (can show known details pre-filled — not the focus now) or an Aria composer question on editor entry. Same decision applies to the vanilla user who provided nothing.
↓
Editor opens — creation mode
all disabled until injection done
Everything is disabled and the Add panel is not exposed while injection runs. Funnel-data carry-over into this editor is not developed yet in V0.
V1.1 Editor first
Editor opens — Aria composer
questions inside the editor
Aria asks the intake questions (name → type) directly in the composer panel. Answer carry-over is already developed in V1.1.
↓
Templates shown
user chooses one
Grid filtered by the user's answers ("Design with AI" is the alternative path — out of Template Injection scope).
↓
Open another editor
template editor — full reload
The editor the user was in is coupled to a blank site — it cannot render the chosen template. Picking a template must load the template editor (a different editor).
↓
Content injection
answers already in the session
The intake answers travel with the session into the template editor — injection runs on them directly, no platform pull needed.
↓
Background app install
if prompt needs app not in template
If the user's prompt implies functionality the template doesn't have (e.g. bookings), the app is installed for them silently in the background.
↓
Personalized site ready
same end state for both flows
Template personalized with the user's content; Aria shows "Your site is ready" + next steps.
↓
Apps rules — both flows
silent install · add from prompt · never remove
Apps bundled with the template are installed silently (lightweight, no confirmation). Apps implied by the prompt are added. Apps are never removed — no removal path exists in this flow.
Click any box to expand its detail · scroll down for the screen-by-screen flows
Problem to Solve
When a Wix self-creator selects a template and enters the editor, Aria opens in an empty, disconnected state — the template selection signal is dropped. No guided personalization, no context, no transition.
Solution
Immediately after template selection, Aria presents a 2-question intake (business name → business type → optional free text) and passes answers to AI2Wix to personalize the template before the user starts editing.
Target
Self-Creator — Wix users building their own site.
Key Terms
Intake
3-step Q&A: Q1 (name) → Q2 (type) → Q3 (any changes?)
Generic state
Template as selected: real design, placeholder text + stock images
Personalized state
After AI2Wix: business name, specific copy, matched images
AI2Wix
LLM-powered content generation that produces personalized content from intake answers
Aria composer
Right-side panel in Harmony editor where Q cards appear
Handoff card
"Your site is ready" card shown after personalization
Business insights platform
Funnel answers store, built by the funnel team. V0 pulls from it to check what's missing; V1.1 doesn't need it — answers live in the editor session
Creation mode
V0 editor state during injection: everything disabled, Add panel hidden
Must-Ship-First (Blockers + Critical)
BLOCKER
FR-001 Aria opens with intake — not empty state — when template is selected
CRITICAL
FR-002 Business name Q1 card with suggested options + free text
CRITICAL
FR-003 Business type Q2 with dynamic title using Q1 answer
CRITICAL
FR-005 Selected template visible on stage throughout intake
CRITICAL
FR-008 Personalized site reveal + "Your site is ready" handoff
V0 Dashboard First
V1.1 Editor First
Harmony Creation V0 — Dashboard First Entry: Wix Dashboard → "Design Site" → "Design your site with Aria" page
Step 02 paths in full detail — chat / wizard / skip 3 branches▾
Branch A — "Chat with AI"
Open chat flow → builds Site Profile
Full-screen conversational setup: "First, tell me what your site is all about" → business name → follow-ups. Controls: Help me answer / Skip question / End Chat & Continue. A Site Profile panel builds live on the left — the data source for UC 1.2 auto-inject: when this profile exists, personalization can fire with no further questions.
Branch B — "Set up without Chat"
Old funnel wizard (Steps 02–03)
Classic full-page question wizard: "First, what is your site all about?" (category pills + free text) → "What do you want to call your site?" (AI name suggestions). Each question skippable; "Skip to Dashboard" exits at any point. These are Steps 02–03 in the timeline.
Branch C — "Skip"
Single question only
User skips personalization → shown one question: "Choose a main feature for your site" (Online store, Scheduling, Blog, Restaurant…). Result: minimal context → the Aria prompt page later shows the vanilla generic prompt.
Step 04 prompt variants — template as reference, user adds instructions 2 variants▾
Variant A — Vanilla
Generic prompt
Pre-filled: "Create a professional website for a business that showcases our services and what we offer." — when user skipped Q&A or gave minimal info. Prompt is editable before generating.
Variant B — Template-seeded ★ Core interaction
Specific prompt from Q1+Q2
Pre-filled with context from Q1 + Q2 + template category: "Create a fun and engaging online bakery website for a bakery that specializes in babka…" — "Your prompt is ready." shown. User can read, edit, and append before hitting Generate Site. This is the template-as-reference pattern.
Minimal-details branch — Aria completes answers in the editor 1 branch▾
Branch — "User gives minimal details"
Aria completes missing answers inside the editor
If the user skipped or half-answered the Q&A (e.g. gave only a business type), Aria asks the missing question as a card in the editor composer, over the selected template on stage. Figma note: "if user answers only the business type, Aria completes the question of business name." Covers FR-001, FR-002, FR-003, FR-005.
Edge cases — all flows 6 cases▾
Q1 + Q2 both skipped
Vanilla prompt used. Template category still filters recommendations. No injection failure — graceful fallback to generic personalization.
Q1 skipped only
User answers Q2 but not Q1. Q2 title falls back to "What type of business is this?" — no name interpolation. Aria infers name from type for AI2Wix call.
Q2 skipped only
User provides name, skips type. AI2Wix receives name only. Category-level personalization used as fallback.
Seamless inject — UC 1.2
Business insights platform has all funnel answers (name + type). No Q&A shown — content is injected seamlessly. V0 only.
Injection failure
AI2Wix returns error or empty. Editor opens with un-injected template. Aria: "I wasn't able to personalize this one — let's work on it together."
Template load failure
Template fails to load on stage. Aria intake still opens and Q1 card appears — intake does not block on stage load. Stage shows skeleton.
Both V0 and V1.1 converge at the same editor result state — template personalized, Aria showing "What's next for your site?"
Harmony Creation First V1.1 — Editor First Entry: Harmony editor opens → Aria greets with open composer → Site introduction tab
Path split at Step 04 — "Design with AI" branch out of scope▾
Path split at Step 04: If user clicks "Design with AI" instead of selecting a template → flow diverges to full AI site generation with its own wait screen ("This could take a few minutes, we will let you know when it's ready" — Aria narrates the site plan). Out of Template Injection scope; Template Injection covers only the path through the template grid.
Loader variants seen in Figma 2 variants▾
Loader A — Progress modal
"Adding Wix Tips — (2/5)"
Step-counter modal over the blurred editor, same pattern as V0's "(2/13)" loader. Used when the site is assembled app-by-app after template selection.
Loader B — Frost overlay
Ambient gradient, no text
Soft blue/green animated overlay covering the stage. Used in the in-editor content-injection band ("Template loader" label in Figma) while Aria personalizes the template. Maps to FR-007.
Converges with V0 at the same completion state — Aria shows "Welcome to your {businessName} site" + "What's next?" card.
